title: Ardova Plc Launches AP SuperMax Lubricant, Targets Mass Market - FinancialEDGE
description: Ardova Plc has launched a new lubricant brand, AP SuperMax, aimed at providing affordable and quality engine protection for everyday users in Nigeria. The product is designed for older engines, motorcycles, tricycles, and generators, and is available in one-litre and four-litre packs, priced at ₦3,750 and ₦13,300 respectively. Deputy Managing Director, Dr. Abiola Babatunde Ojo,
html:
Ardova Plc has launched a new lubricant brand, AP SuperMax, aimed at providing affordable and quality engine protection for everyday users in Nigeria.

The product is designed for older engines, motorcycles, tricycles, and generators, and is available in one-litre and four-litre packs, priced at ₦3,750 and ₦13,300 respectively.

Deputy Managing Director, Dr. Abiola Babatunde Ojo, stated that AP SuperMax is a unique brand aimed at competing in the highly price sensitive segment of the lubricant market.

The product is part of Ardova’s strategy to expand its market reach and strengthen its position in the downstream energy and industrial value chain.

The launch is expected to deepen Ardova’s presence in the lubricant sector and support the mobility and productivity of millions of Nigerians. AP SuperMax is available nationwide through AP service stations, accredited distributors, and digital platforms.

 

Photo Caption: L-R: Dr. Abiola Babatunde-Ojo, Deputy Managing Director, Ardova Plc, Dr. AbdulWasiu Sowami, Executive Chairman, Ardova Plc, Alh. Lateef Adeleke (Great Ade De Young Company) Mr. Onwuka Augustine (Danberton Network) and Sade Taiwo, General Manager AP Lubricants at the AP SuperMax Lubricant launch held in Lagos.
